message:
style: reformat method chain alignment in Semantic Scholar field
validation helpers

Break optional_string_field() and optional_i64_field() method chains
across lines to align .as_str()/.as_i64(), .map(), and .ok_or_else()
calls consistently with the project's formatting conventions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
